title: cannot simplify predicate in the LogicalSelection's Cond
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

```
CREATE TABLE `t1` ( `a` char(3) NOT NULL default '', `b` char(3) NOT NULL default '', `c` char(3) NOT NULL default '', PRIMARY KEY  (`a`,`b`,`c`)) ENGINE=InnoDB;
CREATE TABLE t2 LIKE t1;
INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (1,1,1);
INSERT INTO t2 VALUES (1,1,1);
SELECT t1.b, count(*) FROM t1 group by t1.b having
count(*) > ALL (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t2 WHERE t2.a=1 GROUP By t2.b)
```
<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

```
|   ├─Selection_50(Build)          | 0.80     | root      |               | or(if(ne(Column#13, 0), NULL, 1), eq(Column#14, 0))
```
### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

```
|   ├─Selection_50(Build)          | 0.80     | root      |               | or(if(ne(Column#13, 0), NULL, 1), or(eq(Column#14, 0), 0))
```

```or(eq(Column#14, 0), 0))``` => "eq(Column#14, 0)"
### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->

2bd14176d4aa185f2b6f88cb506b4b8cc754a18d
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3 ( x int NOT NULL, y varchar(5), z date NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (x, y));
CREATE TABLE t4 ( m float NOT NULL, n text NOT NULL, o timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (m));
SELECT t3.y, COUNT(*) FROM t3 WHERE t3.x > 0 GROUP BY t3.y HAVING COUNT(*) > (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t4 WHERE t4.m < 2 GROUP BY t4.n);
key_bug_features: cannot simplify predicate in LogicalSelection's Cond
